positive: A maximalist celestial geometric pattern featuring intertwining silhouettes of mythical sea creatures, stylized blooming flowers, and constellations, forming a continuous border. The design must have strong, crisp black lines against a clean, off-white background. Use a highly contrasting ink style with solid color fills for depth. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly detailed, optimized for textile print. Vector art style, clean linework, symmetrical and balanced layout, deep emerald and gold accents, high contrast, engraving style, full print-ready detail.
